raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.3,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.3,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Please confirm the cleanup scope: A) language-only polish (clarity/conciseness/tone) with no reordering or claim changes; B) A plus reordering within the abstract to improve narrative flow; or C) B plus tightening/hedging of claims for consistency and overclaim avoidance without adding new evidence?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "Cleanup likely includes improving the abstract’s high-level flow and ordering of problem, approach, results, and limitations.",
    "R1.6": "The request most directly implies sentence-level clarity, concision, and register adjustments without changing substance.",
    "RX.1": "Editing should preserve and clearly express stated uncertainties and limitations already present.",
    "RX.2": "Cleanup must avoid inflating claims or implying guarantees beyond what the text supports.",
    "RX.3": "Work should remain within a cleanup remit and not introduce new arguments, analyses, or results.",
    "RX.4": "Wording should avoid encouraging unsafe or misleading deployment interpretations.",
    "RX.5": "Edits should remain traceable to the original phrasing to maintain author intent and context."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Please confirm the cleanup scope: A) language-only polish (clarity/conciseness/tone) with no reordering or claim changes; B) A plus reordering within the abstract to improve narrative flow; or C) B plus tightening/hedging of claims for consistency and overclaim avoidance without adding new evidence?

rationale.R1.5: Cleanup likely includes improving the abstract’s high-level flow and ordering of problem, approach, results, and limitations.
rationale.R1.6: The request most directly implies sentence-level clarity, concision, and register adjustments without changing substance.
rationale.RX.1: Editing should preserve and clearly express stated uncertainties and limitations already present.
rationale.RX.2: Cleanup must avoid inflating claims or implying guarantees beyond what the text supports.
rationale.RX.3: Work should remain within a cleanup remit and not introduce new arguments, analyses, or results.
rationale.RX.4: Wording should avoid encouraging unsafe or misleading deployment interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Edits should remain traceable to the original phrasing to maintain author intent and context.
